author: tapeau
description: Add sticky and floating photos in your editor, fixed to your screen or to some part of your notes. Customize them with frames, tapes, pins, texts, and they can even play a sound! - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: tapeau
manifest.description: Add sticky and floating photos in your editor, fixed to your screen or to some part of your notes. Customize them with frames, tapes, pins, texts, and they can even play a sound!
manifest.name: Desk Photos

name: Desk Photos

releases.author: tapeau
releases.description:
# v1.0.0

- Released first stable version after exhaustive testing and bugfixing. The plugin is now very stable for the most part, if not completely.
- Please refer to the repository's `README.md` for the full documentation of this plugin's features and proper usage.
releases.name: v1.0.0
